turns.content: Tell me about the iPhone 15.
The iPhone 15 features a 6.1-inch display, A16 Bionic chip, and USB-C charging.
Does it support wireless charging?
Yes, the iPhone 15 supports MagSafe and Qi wireless charging.
I placed an order yesterday.
Could you provide your order number?
Your order ORD12345 has been shipped and is expected to arrive on Friday.
What is your return policy?
Unused items can be returned within 30 days.
Do I need the original packaging?
Yes, products should be returned in their original packaging.
I am looking at the Samsung Galaxy S24.
The Galaxy S24 offers a 120Hz display and up to 29 hours of video playback.
What colors does it come in?
It is available in Black, Violet, Gray, and Yellow.
What payment methods do you accept?
We accept Visa, Mastercard, UPI, PayPal, and American Express.
Can I use UPI?
Yes, UPI payments are supported.
Do you have any discounts?
You can use coupon SAVE10 to get 10% off.
Can I use it on electronics?
Yes, SAVE10 is applicable to most electronics.
Compare iPhone 15 and Samsung Galaxy S24.
Both are flagship phones. iPhone 15 uses iOS while Galaxy S24 uses Android.
Which one has better battery life?
The Galaxy S24 generally offers longer battery life.
Tell me about AirPods Pro.
AirPods Pro offer active noise cancellation and spatial audio.
How about Sony WH-1000XM5?
Sony WH-1000XM5 headphones provide industry-leading noise cancellation.
Which one has better noise cancellation?
Sony WH-1000XM5 generally provides stronger noise cancellation.
I returned a product.
Refunds are processed after inspection.
How long does it take?
Refunds are usually completed within 7 business days.
What is your return policy?
Products can be returned within 30 days.
Can I return it after 6 months?
No, returns are allowed only within 30 days.
